name: ai-mobile
description: A finite event-driven local AI resource orchestrator with a lightweight Codex console and separate Codex CLI, Claude, Antigravity, and Cursor work plane.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local AI workers with durable evidence, not chat polling.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile installs one shared MCP runtime into Codex and Claude Code. The visible Codex task is a lightweight zero-file project console, while a finite detached event-driven coordinator assigns acceptance-linked work to authenticated Codex CLI, Claude Code, Antigravity CLI, and optional Cursor workers using fresh capability, quota, reset, reliability, RAM, storage, priority, and total-cost evidence. Structured observations become exact writer units. Isolated patches are integrated exactly once with boundary and deterministic verification gates; isolated Codex writers return validated diffs without sandbox bypass. Passive material status and privacy-safe provider diagnostics provide visibility without provider probes, repeated model turns, Goals, automations, hidden continuations, or desktop launches.
capabilities: Separate Codex CLI, Claude, Antigravity, and Cursor work plane
Fresh model and quota-pool capacity evidence
Bounded deterministic dispatch, collect, integrate, and advance cycle
Trusted Fable 5 and Sonnet 5 primary writers
Shared Codex and Claude Code installation
Exact OpenAI.Codex package and task restart
Path-bounded Codex diff transport without sandbox bypass
defaultPrompt: Use AI Mobile to finish this project outcome with the visible task as a lightweight console and separate work-plane workers
Use AI Mobile for this nontrivial project task and require end-to-end evidence before completion
Use AI Mobile to coordinate these separate projects as one finite evidence-gated portfolio
Show the passive AI Mobile resource inventory
